title: 10 dead in South Korea car plant fire
summary_full: A fire at a South Korea car parts plant killed 10 people, the Yonhap news agency reported early Saturday citing authorities, with rescuers still searching for four missing. A total of 170 workers were in the plant when the fire started, Yonhap reported.
